mapper.select:
WITH counts AS ( SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(FID.NUMBER_COUNT), 0) FROM T_FD_INVOICE FI LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL FID ON FID.INVOICE_ID =FI.ID WHERE INVOICE_TYPE_CODE ='10' AND STATUS ='1' AND INVOICE_TIME = TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS INVOICE_DAY_COUNT,
(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(FID.NUMBER_COUNT), 0) FROM T_FD_INVOICE FI LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL FID ON FID.INVOICE_ID =FI.ID WHERE INVOICE_TYPE_CODE ='10' AND STATUS ='1' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM INVOICE_TIME) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM INVOICE_TIME) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) AS INVOICE_MOUTH_COUNT,
(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(FID.NUMBER_COUNT), 0) FROM T_FD_INVOICE FI LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL FID ON FID.INVOICE_ID =FI.ID WHERE INVOICE_TYPE_CODE ='10' AND STATUS ='1' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM INVOICE_TIME) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) AS INVOICE_YEAR_COUNT,
(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(FID.NUMBER_COUNT), 0) FROM T_FD_INVOICE FI LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL FID ON FID.INVOICE_ID =FI.ID WHERE FI.INVOICE_TYPE_CODE ='10' AND FI.STATUS ='1' AND FID.TRADE_TYPE='外贸' AND INVOICE_TIME = TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS TRADE_DAY_COUNT,
(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(FID.NUMBER_COUNT), 0) FROM T_FD_INVOICE FI LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL FID ON FID.INVOICE_ID =FI.ID WHERE FI.INVOICE_TYPE_CODE ='10' AND FI.STATUS ='1' AND FID.TRADE_TYPE='外贸' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM INVOICE_TIME) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM INVOICE_TIME) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) AS TRADE_MOUTH_COUNT,
(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(FID.NUMBER_COUNT), 0) FROM T_FD_INVOICE FI LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL FID ON FID.INVOICE_ID =FI.ID WHERE FI.INVOICE_TYPE_CODE ='10' AND FI.STATUS ='1' AND FID.TRADE_TYPE='外贸' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM INVOICE_TIME) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) AS TRADE_YEAR_COUNT,
(SELECT COALESCE(count(NOTE_ID), 0) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE IS_FINISHED = 0 AND IS_DELETE = 0) AS nowCarCount,
(SELECT COALESCE(count(NOTE_ID), 0) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE WEIGH_IN_DT >= TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND WEIGH_IN_DT < TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1) AS dayCarCount,
(SELECT COALESCE(count(NOTE_ID), 0) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM WEIGH_IN_DT) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM WEIGH_IN_DT) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) AS mouthCarCount,
(SELECT COALESCE(count(NOTE_ID), 0) from WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE WEIGH_IN_DT >= TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND WEIGH_IN_DT < TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1 AND PORT_CODE ='01') AS eastPort,
(SELECT COALESCE(count(NOTE_ID), 0) from WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE WEIGH_IN_DT >= TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND WEIGH_IN_DT < TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1 AND PORT_CODE ='02') AS midPort,
(SELECT COALESCE(count(NOTE_ID), 0) from WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE WEIGH_IN_DT >= TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND WEIGH_IN_DT < TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1 AND PORT_CODE ='03') AS westPort FROM dual ) SELECT * FROM counts

SELECT t1.CARGO_TYPE_CODE,t1.CARGO_TYPE_NAME,sum (FID.NUMBER_COUNT) allCount FROM T_FD_INVOICE FI LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL FID ON FID.INVOICE_ID = FI.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCS.STATEMENT_NO = FID.STATEMENT_NO LEFT JOIN M_CARGO t ON t.CARGO_CODE = TCS.CARGO_CODE LEFT JOIN M_CARGO_CATEGORY t1 ON t.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = t1.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE FI.INVOICE_TYPE_CODE = '10' AND FI.STATUS = '1' AND EXTRACT( MONTH FROM INVOICE_TIME ) = EXTRACT( MONTH FROM TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) ) AND EXTRACT( YEAR FROM INVOICE_TIME ) = EXTRACT( YEAR FROM TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) ) GROUP BY t1.CARGO_TYPE_CODE,t1.CARGO_TYPE_NAME
